This is a new service. For urgent matters, please visit ynepf.co.uk.

Yorkshire & North East Powerlifting Federation
  • Committee
  • Calendar
  • Volunteering
  • 2026 initiatives
  • FAQs

The home of drug tested powerlifting in Yorkshire and the North East

We run a full calendar of sanctioned, drug tested competitions across the region, from your first novice meet to our divisional championships. Everyone is welcome on the platform.

Upcoming events

  • Parkhead Open

    Entry closed

    A sanctioned franchise competition run by the Parkhead Powerlifting Club at the Hirst Welfare Centre, Ashington. Good food at reasonable prices.

    20 Oct 2025 Hirst Welfare Centre 48 lifters

  • YNE Nov Open

    Entry open

    The largest competition of the year, with prizes for best lifter supplied by SBD. Entry opens 20 Sept 2025 at 9am and closes 20 Oct at 12pm.

    15–16 Nov 2025 Riccall Regen Centre 96 lifters

  • Annual General Meeting

    Motions must be tabled in advance of the AGM via our Google Form.

    05 Dec 2025 Zoom

  • Divisional Referee Course

    Start your journey as a referee in British Powerlifting. Please study the IPF Technical Rules before the course.

    12 Dec 2025 Bannatyne Health Club, York 10 spots

  • YNE Jan Open

    The first competition of 2026.

    17 Jan 2026 Riccall Regen Centre 48 lifters

See the full 2026 competition calendar

Resources

  • Buy a membership

    To lift in the YNEPF you need a valid British Powerlifting membership.

  • Technical rules

    The rules of powerlifting performance that we follow in the YNEPF.

  • Approved kit

    Only officially registered equipment may be used in the YNEPF.

  • Divisional records

    Records set by YNEPF lifters at all levels of competition.

© Yorkshire & North East Powerlifting Federation 2026
